name: Spectacular Party: Ashe and Rei’s new team || Bad Ending Party [Crossover AU5]
description:
SPECTACULAR PARTY

Ashe and Rei, the S-Ranks, the two been on their own since Lihan has his own lteam. The two S-Ranks couldn’t handle such powerful tasks from the other mighty villains since the day of the Merge Collision. With the enlistment of mercenaries, Ashe and Rei will show them the ropes and become the first Anti-hero party of the Adventurer’s Guild, plus registered by S.H.I.E.L.D.

The Team

This team is composed of the following. Ashe and Rei as the founding members of the team, the elf is a sorceress and a healer, and Rei is a cyborg with a shotgun as strong as steel. Father, hailed from the Kids Next Door universe, a force to be reckoned with, fire is his main ability plus his source was rage, and his dragon transformation is his most powerful attribute in combat. Dinobot, the Predacon turned Maximal, which takes the alt mode of a velociraptor is a combat expert and tactical, he took out an entire Predacon army with Transmetal Megatron in Code of Hero (Beast Wars S2), he wields a sword and a spinning tail shield for defense and range attack. The Cryo Cicin Mage, now revealed her name to be Sasha, was a former member of the Fatui, she’s a rogue fighter with her icy and playful demeanor that mixes well with her ice powers and her ability to summon cicins as her minions. Sir Pentious, now in his heavenly form thanks to him being forgiven after sacrificing himself for his friends as an act of selflessness, though not capable of fighting in battle, but luckily his brains and intelligence comes to play when it’s about technology and machinery, this makes him the smartest snake of the bunch. And everyone’s favorite fourth wall breaker and mercenary, Deadpool, his strength and durability are as strong as his adamntium katanas against his opponents.

The villains

We got the villains on the run. Ulysses Klaw, equipped with a supersonic weapon on his arm with a vibranium as its power source making him a noisy force. William Afton aka Springtrap, the man who murdered five children and stuffed them in the animatronics, he died when he wore the Spring Bonnie suit due to its springlock failure function, but he was revived from the dead and became a zombie-like animatronic. Kars the Ultimate Lifeform, or as he claimed to be, one of the most powerful Pillar Men combined with the stone mask and Stone of Aja, he became an ultimate being as close to a God, he has the ability to turn his body or any of his body parts into living creatures. Whiplash aka Ivan Vanko the Russian enemy of Iron Mam, with electrical whips that critically destroyed Tony’s suit once in Iron Man 2, his whips are as shocking as its electrical power. Crimson Dynamo, from the EMH universe, he has an armor taller and bigger than Iron Man, he also possesses high weaponry on his armor that makes him a dangerous force. Syndrome, the one who is responsible for killing other superheroes
creator: Purple Samuel
